auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to continue with your PawHaven account.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to record and support more stray-animal rescues.
auth.securityNotice: Use a secure email and a strong password to protect your account and rescue data.
auth.helpGuideDesc: Learn how to help stray animals safely.
auth.helpHomeDesc: Take a quick look at the latest rescue activity on the platform.
auth.promoTitle: One account connects rescue records, guides, and community.
auth.promoDesc: After signing in, you will get menu and page access that matches your current user state.

rescueGuide.title: Rescue Guide
rescueGuide.intro: Learn how to safely and kindly help stray animals. Here are five simple steps 💙

steps.title: Assess if Rescue Is Needed
steps.desc: Observe if the animal is injured, weak, or trapped. If it’s resting or has a collar, keep your distance.

steps.title: Ensure Your Safety
steps.desc: Keep a safe distance and avoid sudden movements. Speak softly and do not chase or grab the animal.

steps.title: Provide Basic Help
steps.desc: Offer clean water or a towel if needed. Do not feed or medicate without proper knowledge.

steps.title: Seek Professional Help
steps.desc: Contact local rescue stations, veterinarians, or PawHaven volunteers for assistance.

steps.title: Submit a Rescue Report
steps.desc: Record and share your rescue story on PawHaven to help connect more volunteers.
